stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The following two images show the buffet margins of the same aircraft. Image A has a larger gap between the yellow bars than Image B. Why might the difference between the buffet margins exist between aircraft A and aircraft B?

options.a: Aircraft B is at a higher flight level than aircraft A.
options.b: Aircraft B is at a lower flight level than aircraft A.
options.c: Aircraft A has a higher mass than aircraft B.
options.d: Aircraft A and B are at the same flight level, but the load factor of aircraft A is higher than B.
